column2:
svg('upset.svg')
upset(upset_data, 
      sets = c("PCR_cDNA_High", "PCR_cDNA_Medium", "PCR_cDNA_Low", 
               "Direct_RNA_High", "Direct_RNA_Medium", "Direct_RNA_Low"),
      sets.bar.color = c("#0072B2", "#56B4E9", "#E69F00", 
                         "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "#F0E442"),
      main.bar.color = "black",
      matrix.color = "black",
      order.by = "freq",
      empty.intersections = "on",
      text.scale = c(1.2, 1.0, 1.2, 1.0, 1.2, 1.0),
      mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size",
      sets.x.label = "Set Size",
      mb.ratio = c(0.7, 0.3))
dev.off()
